headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc.
summary: Transparency notification byThe Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments upwards on 29 June 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. stands at 3.05% on 29 June 2026.

headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Cuts Aluminum Forecast And Turns More Bearish On The Yen
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) has cut its aluminum price forecast as supply from the Middle East recovers. The bank has also issued a more bearish outlook for the Japanese yen, citing ongoing fiscal and interest rate pressures in Japan. Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) is a global investment bank and financial services company with a long history in commodities and currency research. Its updated aluminum view reflects changing supply conditions, with Middle East production returning to the...
